name: The Supersuckers
description:
'''The Supersuckers''' (formerly known as '''The Black Supersuckers''') are an American [[Rock music|rock]] band, formed in 1988, whose music is influenced by both [[hard rock]] and [[country music|country]]. [[AllMusic]] describes the band as "the bastard sons of [[Foghat]], [[AC/DC]], and [[ZZ Top]] after being weaned on punk rock, unafraid of massive guitar riffs, outsized personalities, or pledging allegiance to sex, weed, and Satan with a wink and a nudge."

Bassist/singer Eddie Spaghetti (real name Edward Daly) leads the band and is its only constant member. Their current lineup also includes guitarist Marty Chandler and drummer Christopher von Streicher. Their most recent album, ''[[Liquor, Women, Drugs & Killing]]'', was released in October 2025.
